---
title: "Welcome"
---

# Welcome to Your Project

This is the homepage for both your website and book. This content is shared between both formats.

## About This Project

This project demonstrates how to create both a website and a book using Quarto, with shared content between both formats.

## Navigation

- [Chapter 1](chapters/chapter1.qmd)
- [Chapter 2](chapters/chapter2.qmd)

## Building

To build this project:

```bash
# Build both website and book
make all

# Build website only
make website

# Build book only
make book

# Preview website locally
make preview
```
